sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 23:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 23:1
items.html: Yod implies the Nekudot [dots] of the first expansion, meaning the expansion of lights from Hochma downward, which is there. Vav implies the Nekudot of the second expansion, which is also from Hochma downward. However, there is no intimation of the light Keter of the first expansion and the second expansion in the four letters HaVaYaH.
